"'''The Storm's Edge'''" was a web enhancement for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'', published at [[Wizards.com]] on [[May 10]], [[2001]].

{{Game-stub}}

==Plot summary==
A group of adventurers attempt to free [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Momaw Nadon/Legends|Momaw Nadon]], who is being held captive by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] and a local crimelord on a [[Sail barge/Legends|sail barge]] in [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine's]] [[Jundland Wastes/Legends|Jundland Wastes]].
